lessons.title: What is Flutter?
lessons.description: Discover Flutter, its architecture, and why it's great for mobile development.

lessons.title: Setting Up Your Environment
lessons.description: Install Flutter SDK, Android Studio/Xcode, and configure your editor.

lessons.title: Your First Flutter App
lessons.description: Create a new project and run it on an emulator or device.

lessons.title: Project Structure
lessons.description: Explore the folders and files in a Flutter project.

lessons.title: Hot Reload and Debugging
lessons.description: Learn how to use hot reload for fast iteration and basic debugging.
